suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require explicit `followedProcedure=false` when mandatory manual verification steps (dev server + agent-browser/curl) are omitted, even in fix-only runs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review `fix-byok-optimize-scrutiny-issues` found transcript marked `followedProcedure=true` despite no agent-browser/dev-server/curl evidence for manual verification requirements.
